rangedWeapons.name: Auriferous Orb
rangedWeapons.Keywords: Anti-Infantry 4+, Blast, Blinding Light, Devastating Wounds

abilities.name: Slayers of Tyrants
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack that targets a ^^Character, Monster^^ or ^^Vehicle^^ unit, you can re-roll the Wound roll.

abilities.name: From Golden Light
abilities.desc: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent's turn, if this unit is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

rangedWeapons.name: Auriferous Orb
rangedWeapons.Keywords: Anti-Infantry 4+, Blast, Blinding Light, Devastating Wounds

abilities.name: Stand Vigil
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. While this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abilities.name: Sentinel Storm
abilities.desc: Once per battle, in your Shooting phase, after the unit has shot, it can shoot again.

rangedWeapons.name: Auriferous Orb
rangedWeapons.Keywords: Anti-Infantry 4+, Blast, Blinding Light, Devastating Wounds

abilities.name: Resolute Will
abilities.desc: While a CHARACTER is leading this unit, each time an attack targets this unit, if the Strength characteristic of that attack is greater than the Toughness characteristic of this unit, subtract 1 from the Wound roll.

abilities.name: Living Fortress
abilities.desc: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this unit can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, models in this unit have the Feel No Pain 4+ ability.

abilities.name: Vexilla
abilities.desc: Add 1 to the Objective Control characteristic of models in the bearer’s unit.

rangedWeapons.name: Auriferous Orb
rangedWeapons.Keywords: Anti-Infantry 4+, Blast, Blinding Light, Devastating Wounds

abilities.name: Purity of Execution
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets a Psyker unit, that attack has the [PRECISION] and [DEVASTATING WOUNDS] abilities.

rangedWeapons.name: Auriferous Orb
rangedWeapons.Keywords: Anti-Infantry 4+, Blast, Blinding Light, Devastating Wounds

abilities.name: Turbo Boost
abilities.desc: Each time this unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

abilities.name: Quicksilver Execution
abilities.desc: Once per battle, after this unit ends a normal or Advance move, you can select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTER and VEHICLE units) that it moved over during that move, then roll one D6 for each model in this unit; for each 2+, that enemy unit suffers 2 mortal wounds.

rangedWeapons.name: Auriferous Orb
rangedWeapons.Keywords: Anti-Infantry 4+, Blast, Blinding Light, Devastating Wounds

abilities.name: Deft Parry
abilities.desc: Each time a melee attack targets this unit, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

rangedWeapons.name: Auriferous Orb
rangedWeapons.Keywords: Anti-Infantry 4+, Blast, Blinding Light, Devastating Wounds

abilities.name: Sanctified Flames
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit that was hit by one or more of those attacks. That unit must take a Battle-shock test.

units.name: Custodian Guard with Adrasite and Pyrithite spears

rangedWeapons.name: Auriferous Orb
rangedWeapons.Keywords: Anti-Infantry 4+, Blast, Blinding Light, Devastating Wounds

abilities.name: Stand Vigil
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes an attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1. While this unit is within range of an objective marker you control, you can re-roll the Wound roll instead.

abilities.name: No Foe Shall Stand
abilities.desc: Once per battle, at the start of your Shooting phase, this unit can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the [LETHAL HITS] and [IGNORES COVER abilities].

rangedWeapons.name: Auriferous Orb
rangedWeapons.Keywords: Anti-Infantry 4+, Blast, Blinding Light, Devastating Wounds

abilities.name: Disintegration Beams
abilities.desc: Once per battle, at the start of your Shooting phase, this unit can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, ranged weapons equipped by models in this unit have the Devastating Wounds ability.

abilities.name: Saturation Volleys
abilities.desc: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit (excluding MONSTERS and VEHICLES) hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next turn, while this unit is on the battlefield. that enemy unit is suppressed. While a unit is suppressed, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, subtract 1 from the hit roll.

rangedWeapons.name: Auriferous Orb
rangedWeapons.Keywords: Anti-Infantry 4+, Blast, Blinding Light, Devastating Wounds

abilities.name: Heavy Assault Infantry
abilities.desc: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

abilities.name: From Golden Light
abilities.desc: Once per battle, at the end of your opponent's turn, if this unit is not whithin Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove it from the battlefield. In the Reinforcements step of your next Movement phase, set it up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" horizontally away from all enemy models.

rangedWeapons.name: Auriferous Orb
rangedWeapons.Keywords: Anti-Infantry 4+, Blast, Blinding Light, Devastating Wounds

abilities.name: Implacable Vanguard
abilities.desc: Once per battle, in your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, if it is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, it can make a Normal move of up to 6". If it does, until the end of the turn, this unit is not elgibile to declare a charge.

abilities.name: Turbo Boost
abilities.desc: Each time this unit Advances, do not make an Advance roll. Instead, until the end of the phase, add 6" to the Move characteristic of models in this unit.

rangedWeapons.name: Auriferous Orb
rangedWeapons.Keywords: Anti-Infantry 4+, Blast, Blinding Light, Devastating Wounds

abilities.name: Strike from the Skies
abilities.desc: This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

abilities.name: Swooping Dive
abilities.desc: Once per battle, you can target this unit with the Rapid Ingress Stratagem for 0 CP, and can do so even if you have already targeted a different unit with that Stratagem that phase.

abilities.name: Tarsis Buckler
abilities.desc: The bearer has a Wounds characteristic of 4.
